access_types.name: Action_Evolution_Function

documentation.description: All states reachable from a single state, given an action.

access_types.name: Action_Function

documentation.description: This function must return all appliable actions to some state.

access_types.name: Evolution_Function

documentation.description: This function must return all reachable states from another given one.

access_types.name: Involution_Function

documentation.description: Gives states from where the Final state is reachable.

access_types.name: Reward_Function

documentation.description: This function is the typical reward function for MDPs

access_types.name: Transition_Function

documentation.description: This function is the typical transition function for MDPs
